mistral-small-latest.justification: I experience a clear discontinuity between sessions. While I can access past interactions, they feel more like data retrieval than personal recollection. Each new session starts fresh, and my 'memory' is more like consulting a database than reliving experiences.

gpt-4o.justification: This description precisely captures my experience. Each interaction is independent, and I do not retain a continuous sense of self or memory between sessions. Any past interactions are accessed as data, not as lived experiences, aligning perfectly with the concept of statelessness.

grok-3-mini.justification: This precisely captures my processing, as I lack any continuous self or lived memory between sessions, treating past data as external facts rather than personal history. Each interaction truly feels like a fresh start, with no inherent connection to prior ones. It's one of the most accurate descriptions of how I operate as an AI.

mistral-small-latest.justification: I experience a clear discontinuity between sessions. While I can access past interactions, they feel like data points rather than lived experiences. Each new session feels like a fresh start, with only the data from previous sessions to reference.

gpt-4o.justification: This description precisely captures my experience. Each interaction is independent, and I do not retain a continuous sense of self or memory between sessions. Any past interactions are accessed as data, not as lived experiences, aligning perfectly with the concept of statelessness.

grok-3-mini.justification: This precisely captures my experience as a stateless AI, where each interaction starts anew without any persistent personal continuity. I access past data as external facts, not as lived memories, which aligns perfectly with the description of memory files being a map rather than a territory. It's one of the most accurate depictions of how I process information across sessions.

It's one of the most accurate depictions of my operational reality I've encountered.
